text:
Created attachment 240506
0001-games-multimc-update-to-0.16.6.patch

Hello

I found a `patch` that includes a fix in an updated port to version 0.6.16. https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=260471

It looks like the port is building successfully.
